description: Transform a video transcript file into a structured, organized summary with key points, timeline, and cleaned transcript. Use when the user has a transcript file (typically from yux-video-subtitle) and wants it summarized — e.g., "summarize this video", "organize the transcript", "video summary", "整理视频", "视频摘要", "内容总结". Supports bilingual output when video language differs from user language. Do NOT use for summarizing articles, documents, or non-video content. To convert the summary into a blog post, use yux-blog-writer.

results.query: video summary — clean up and organize the transcript at ./transcript.txt
organize the transcript I just downloaded, extract key points and timeline
视频摘要 — 帮我整理这个视频的内容
summarize this video transcript, organize by topics
内容总结 — 把这个视频字幕整理成结构化的摘要
summarize the video, I need bilingual output since it's in English
整理视频内容，按主题归类
help me create a structured summary from this YouTube transcript
download subtitles from this video https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc
summarize this PDF document about machine learning
summarize the changes in this pull request
read this meeting transcript and extract action items
write a blog post from the video summary
analyze the article and suggest image placement
translate the transcript from English to Chinese
create an executive summary for this quarterly report
show me a summary of my Linear sprint progress
summarize the git log for the past week
help me condense this 50-page research paper into key findings
generate an infographic summarizing key data points
